copied_from.display_value: Scheduled script send email notification past End Date

sys_atf_test.description: Tests that the script send an email notification to the request loaner about their overdue loan. Two things are validated in this test. First, that the script trigger the event registration "loaner.overdue". And second, that the notification listening to that event actually send the email.
sys_atf_test.name: Validate content of Overdue email notification
sys_atf_test.sys_name: Validate content of Overdue email notification

sys_update_version.name: sys_atf_test_521081ca83204f105587fa96feaad378
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_atf_test"><sys_atf_test action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><copied_from display_value="Scheduled script send email notification past End Date">e21afc8e83ec0f105587fa96feaad3a2</copied_from><description>Tests that the script send an email notification to the request loaner about their overdue loan. Two things are validated in this test. First, that the script trigger the event registration "loaner.overdue". And second, that the notification listening to that event actually send the email.</description><enable_parameterized_testing>false</enable_parameterized_testing><fail_on_server_error>true</fail_on_server_error><name>Validate content of Overdue email notification</name><parameters/><remember/><sn_atf_tg_generated>false</sn_atf_tg_generated><sys_class_name>sys_atf_test</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-04-30 19:31:35</sys_created_on><sys_id>521081ca83204f105587fa96feaad378</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Validate content of Overdue email notification</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Loaner Device Manager" source="x_1883746_loaner_0">8fa891c8836332105587fa96feaad3c5</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Loaner Device Manager">8fa891c8836332105587fa96feaad3c5</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_atf_test_521081ca83204f105587fa96feaad378</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-04-30 19:32:37</sys_updated_on><test_origin>manual</test_origin></sys_atf_test><sys_variable_value action="delete_multiple" query="document_key=521081ca83204f105587fa96feaad378"/></record_update>
